steps.title: Calculate surface area of each face
steps.content:
Each side of the box is a square with edge length $48$ cm. The area of one square face is $48 \times 48 = 2304$ cm². Since the box has 5 exterior faces (no lid), multiply by 5: $$2304 \times 5 = 11,520$$ sq cm.
$$11,520\,\text{cm}^2\div10,000 = 1.152\,\text{m}^2$$ (1 m² = 10,000 cm²).

The answer is 1.152.
